A network built for choice

The right courier for every route.

No single courier wins every pin code. Shipray helps businesses compare network fit and choose the right partner for each shipment profile.

Compare a shipment Become a partner

What our selection considers

Route serviceabilityPickup and delivery pin-code coverage

Speed & performanceTransit expectation and route reliability

Landed shipping costWeight, zone, mode and applicable fees

Connected courier ecosystem

National reach, regional strength and specialised movement.

Regional Networks
Dynamic courier matching

Choose on evidence, not habit.

A courier that performs well on a metro route may not be the right choice for a remote pin code, heavy parcel or urgent promise. Shipray keeps the decision contextual.

  • Validate serviceability before the shipment is booked
  • Compare economy, standard and priority options
  • Consider actual and volumetric shipment weight
  • Account for COD, remote-area and special-handling needs
  • Build allocation rules for repeat order profiles
Courier A · SurfaceBest landed cost · 4–5 days
₹82
Courier B · AirFastest route · 1–2 days
₹139
Courier C · RegionalStrong destination coverage · 3 days
₹96
Network capabilities

Match the network to the shipment profile.

National coverage

Courier options covering metros, developing cities, towns and extended-area pin codes.

  • Pan-India surface routes
  • Air-enabled major lanes
  • Extended serviceability

Regional specialists

Networks with focused operating strength in specific states, cities or delivery clusters.

  • Local route familiarity
  • Focused hub networks
  • Useful regional alternatives

Special shipment needs

Options for heavy parcels, documents, cargo, returns and business-address delivery.

  • Multi-piece consignments
  • Reverse pickup
  • Priority handling

Build your courier mix with us.

Share your top routes and monthly volume. We will help identify a balanced network for cost, speed and reliability.
